inputs.label: X Value / Input
inputs.businessContext: The x-coordinate if using atan2, or the value for arctan.

businessContext_i18n.en: The x-coordinate if using atan2, or the value for arctan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: atan2 kullanılıyorsa x-koordinatı, arctan için değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die x-Koordinate bei Verwendung von atan2 oder der Wert für arctan.

inputs.label: Y Value (optional)
inputs.businessContext: If provided and non-zero, computes atan2(y, x) instead of arctan(x).

businessContext_i18n.en: If provided and non-zero, computes atan2(y, x) instead of arctan(x).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sağlanırsa ve sıfır değilse, arctan(x) yerine atan2(y, x) hesaplar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn angegeben und ungleich Null, wird atan2(y, x) anstelle von arctan(x) berechnet.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for final output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for final output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nihai çıktı için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die endgültige Ausgabe.

inputs.label: Input Scale
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier applied to x and y before calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier applied to x and y before calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplamadan önce x ve y'ye uygulanan çarpan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator, der vor der Berechnung auf x und y angewendet wird.

inputs.label: Offset Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle added to the result in the output unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle added to the result in the output unit.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel, der zum Ergebnis in der Ausgabeeinheit addiert wird.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
